title: Vir Biotechnology Analyst Ratings and Price Targets
text: Goldman Sachs analyst Paul Choi lowered the price target on Vir Biotechnology to $21.00 (from $28.00) while maintaining a Buy rating. Morgan Stanley analyst Michael Ulz raised the firm's price target on Vir Biotechnology to $24 from $20 and keeps an Overweight rating on the shares. Evercore ISI analyst Cory Kasimov raised the price target to $18 from $12 with an Outperform rating. The consensus rating for Vir Biotechnology is Strong Buy which is based on 8 buy ratings, 0 hold ratings and 0 sell ratings. The average price target is $20.86 with a high forecast of $30.00 and a low forecast of $17.00. Both major banks maintain bullish positions on the stock, with Goldman Sachs at a Buy rating and Morgan Stanley at an Overweight rating, though Goldman Sachs recently lowered its price target from its previous level.
